description_long: This ornate pagoda is perched atop a rocky, elevated base surrounded by lush greenery and flowering cherry blossom trees. The structure features multiple circular and octagonal tiers, each capped with teal-green, upward-curving roofs adorned with decorative finials. The main building is encircled by wooden balconies and supported by columns, giving it an airy, open appearance. A prominent waterfall cascades from the rocky base, adding a dynamic natural element to the scene. The pagoda is accented with traditional East Asian architectural motifs, including intricate railings and ornamental roof details. The overall composition blends natural and built elements, evoking a tranquil, spiritual retreat.
description: A multi-tiered, teal-roofed pagoda with ornate balconies, cherry blossoms, and a cascading waterfall on a rocky, forested base.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main pagoda structure, cherry blossom trees, and a smaller turret on the left.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the circular balconies, tiered roofs, and dense greenery around the base.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the waterfall, rocky base, and the full height of the pagoda's central tower.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the cherry blossoms, waterfall, and the main entrance area of the pagoda.
